\tzpentry{ID3945}{Where Current Density Curl Field Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3945 introduces Where Current Density Curl Field Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\det(\hat{J}_p) \to 0 \quad \text{where} \quad \hat{J}_p = \nabla \times v_{vac}$$
